    dg.state_name, 
    AVG(fcm.rice_production_1000tons) AS avg_rice_production,

    dim_geography dg
JOIN 
    fact_cereals_major fcm ON dg.geography_id = fcm.geography_id

question:
यह क्वेरी अनुवादित करें:
छत्तीसगढ़ के जिलों में मूंगफली और सोयाबीन की खेती के क्षेत्र और उत्पादन के कुल आंकड़ों का वार्षिक विवरण प्रदान करें, विशेष रूप से उन वर्षों के लिए जब मूंगफली वास्तव में उगाई गई थी, सबसे हाल के से सबसे पुराने वर्षों के क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA) > 0.0 ORDER BY T3.YEAR DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dy.year, SUM(fom.groundnut_area_1000ha) AS total_groundnut_area, SUM(fom.groundnut_production_1000tons) AS total_groundnut_production, SUM(fom.soyabean_area_1000ha) AS total_soyabean_area, SUM(fom.soyabean_production_1000tons) AS total_soyabean_production 
FROM fact_oilseeds_major fom 
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fom.geography_id = dg.geography_id 
JOIN dim_year dy ON fom.year_id = dy.year_id 
WHERE dg.state_name ILIKE 'chhattisgarh' AND fom.groundnut_area_1000ha > 0 
GROUP BY dy.year 
ORDER BY dy.year DESC;

question: छत्तीसगढ़ के जिलों को वर्ष 1970 से उनकी औसत सूरजमुखी उपज के आधार पर रैंक करें, सबसे उच्चतम से शुरू करते हुए।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography.dist_name, AVG(fact_oilseeds_sunflower.sunflower_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_sunflower_yield 
FROM fact_oilseeds_sunflower 
JOIN dim_geography ON fact_oilseeds_sunflower.geography_id = dim_geography.geography_id 
JOIN dim_year ON fact_oilseeds_sunflower.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_geography.state_name ILIKE 'chhattisgarh' AND dim_year.year >= 1970 
GROUP BY dim_geography.dist_name 
ORDER BY avg_sunflower_yield DESC;
raw_output:

question: वर्ष 1970 के लिए छत्तीसगढ़ में, मूंगफली और सोयाबीन के उत्पादन और औसत उपज का जिलावार सारांश प्रदान करें, केवल उन जिलों पर ध्यान केंद्रित करें जहाँ मूंगफली का उत्पादन दर्ज किया गया है और उन्हें सोयाबीन उत्पादन के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, SUM(T2.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS TOTAL_GROUNDNUT_PROD, SUM(T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS TOTAL_SOYABEAN_PROD, AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS AVG_GROUNDNUT_YIELD, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS AVG_SOYABEAN_YIELD FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 0.0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC
predicted_sql: SELECT dg.dist_name, SUM(fom.groundnut_production_1000tons) AS total_groundnut_production, SUM(fom.soyabean_production_1000tons) AS total_soyabean_production, AVG(fom.groundnut_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_groundnut_yield, AVG(fom.soyabean_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_soyabean_yield FROM dim_geography dg JOIN fact_oilseeds_major fom ON dg.geography_id = fom.geography_id JOIN dim_year dy ON fom.year_id = dy.year_id WHERE dy.year = 1970 AND dg.state_name ILIKE 'chhattisgarh' AND fom.groundnut_production_1000tons > 0 GROUP BY dg.dist_name ORDER BY total_soyabean_production DESC;
raw_output: SELECT dg.dist_name, SUM(fom.groundnut_production_1000tons) AS total_groundnut_production, SUM(fom.soyabean_production_1000tons) AS total_soyabean_production, AVG(fom.groundnut_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_groundnut_yield, AVG(fom.soyabean_yield_kg_per_ha) AS avg_soyabean_yield FROM dim_geography dg JOIN fact_oilseeds_major fom ON dg.geography_id = fom.geography_id JOIN dim_year dy ON fom.year_id = dy.year_id WHERE dy.year = 1970 AND dg.state_name ILIKE 'chhattisgarh' AND fom.groundnut_production_1000tons > 0 GROUP BY dg.dist_name ORDER BY total_soyabean_production DESC;

question: 1970 में सूरजमुखी उत्पादन की सूचना देने वाले कौन से जिले थे जिनमें 1966 में सूरजमुखी की खेती के लिए कोई भूमि क्षेत्र नहीं था?

FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_oilseeds_sunflower fos ON dg.geography_id = fos.geography_id

AND dg.geography_id NOT IN (
  SELECT dg2.geography_id
